stemHtml: Assuming all other factors remain unchanged, how will an increased mass affect the Speed for Best Angle of Descent and the Speed for Best Rate of Descent? The Speed for Best Angle of Descent...

options.a: increases, and the Speed for Best Rate of Descent increases.
options.b: decreases, and the Speed for Best Rate of Descent increases.
options.c: decreases, and the Speed for Best Rate of Descent decreases.
options.d: increases, and the Speed for Best Rate of Descent decreases.
